§7Guide Book #15§r
§lScorpion§r
§8MOB§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lBehavior§r: Hostile
•§lMob type§r: Large arthropod, Monster.
•§lSpawns in§r: Plains, Forest, Flower Forest, Birch Forest, Dark Forest, Pale Garden, Taiga, Jungle,

Swamp, Savanna.
•§lHealth§r: 16
•§lWalk speed§r: 0.3
•§lBreathes in§r: Air
•§lPossible drops§r: Scorpion Telson, Raw Arthropod Meat, Spider Eye, XP Orbs.
•§lAggressive toward§r: Players, Iron Golem, Snow Golem.

•§lMelee attack damage§r: 2
•§lMelee effect§r: Hunger §o(1:00)§r
•Can climb blocks.

§lDescription§r:
 
§‘Swift, silent, and venomous, Scorpions lurk in the underbrush of forests and savannas alike. With sharp pincers and a poisoned stinger, they scale walls and strike with precision, leaving victims weakened by a lingering hunger.
While not the deadliest predator, their persistence and terrain mastery make them a threat few adventurers ignore.§’
